# FairFare

> Instant taxi fare estimates and tipping guides for international travellers. Know the fair price, avoid scams, tip correctly — anywhere in the world.

FairFare is a travel micropayment utility with two core features:

1. **Taxi Fare Check** — Enter a pickup and destination to receive a fair fare range in local currency, city-specific scam warnings, and a phrase to confirm the fare with your driver in the local language.

2. **Tipping Guide** — Select a country to receive tipping etiquette for six scenarios: restaurants, taxis, hotel porters, bars, tour guides, and delivery.

## Coverage

- Taxi fare data: 120+ cities across Asia, Europe, the Americas, Africa, and the Middle East
- Tipping guides: 50+ countries
- Languages: English, Spanish, French, German
- Currencies: USD, EUR, GBP, AUD, CAD, NZD, SGD, JPY, CHF, HKD

## Pricing

- Single query: from $1.99 USD (one taxi check or tipping guide)
- Country Pass: from $4.99 USD (unlimited queries for one country, 24 hours)
- 10-query bundle: from $9.99 USD (stored on device, 90 days)
- No account or subscription required. Pay once, result unlocks instantly.

## How it works

Fare ranges are calculated from a curated dataset of local taxi rates combined with real-time route distances from Google Maps. A ±15% range is applied for traffic and route variation. Scam warnings and tipping advice are AI-generated by Anthropic Claude and cached for performance.

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://fairfare.app/
- Taxi Fare Check: https://fairfare.app/taxi
- Tipping Guide: https://fairfare.app/tipping
- About: https://fairfare.app/about
- FAQ: https://fairfare.app/faq
- City fare pages: https://fairfare.app/taxi/{city-slug} (e.g. /taxi/paris, /taxi/bangkok)
- Country tipping pages: https://fairfare.app/tipping/{country-slug} (e.g. /tipping/japan, /tipping/france)

## Technology

Built with Next.js 16 (App Router), TailwindCSS, Anthropic Claude claude-sonnet-4-6, Google Maps Platform, and Stripe. Deployed on Vercel.

## Contact

legal@fairfare.app
